runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 313m at Wanganui Straight beaten 3 lengths (17.95) behind My Own World in a Class 2 on March 30. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 375m. Last start finished 2nd over 313m at Wanganui Straight beaten a nose (17.54) behind Flash Inferno in a Class 1 on April 7. Broke a three-start winning streak with the placing last time. Hard to beat.
